title: Recognize Ramón Martínez (EA5IUE) as a core contributor
description: Ramón Martínez (EA5IUE) is a core contributor to OpenHPSDR Zeus but is not currently credited alongside Brian Keating (EI6LF) and Douglas J. Cerrato (KB2UKA). Add him to the contributor lists so public-facing attribution reflects reality.
acceptance_criteria:
- README.md contributor line (around L121-122) lists Ramón Martínez (EA5IUE) alongside EI6LF and KB2UKA
- ATTRIBUTIONS.md 'Zeus contributors' section (around L30-35) adds a bullet: '- **Ramón Martínez (EA5IUE)** — contributor'
- CONTRIBUTING.md sign-off (around L310) updated if appropriate
- grep for 'EI6LF' and 'KB2UKA' confirms no other contributor-list site was missed
- Wording matches the existing style (full name + callsign in parens)
notes:
Files known to list current contributors:
- README.md:121-122  — 'Brian Keating (EI6LF) — project lead, and Douglas J. Cerrato (KB2UKA)'
- ATTRIBUTIONS.md:30-35  — 'Zeus contributors' bulleted list
- CONTRIBUTING.md:310    — '— Doug (KB2UKA) and Brian (EI6LF)' sign-off

Red-light per CLAUDE.md? No — this is documentation/attribution, not visual design, UX, defaults, or architecture. Green-light docs change.

Open question for the maintainer: should the README line read 'project lead' for EI6LF only, or upgrade Ramón / KB2UKA's role label too? Default: keep EI6LF as 'project lead', list the others without a role label, matching current style.
